title: Visitor-pattern refactors for control flow and type checking
body:
Refactored **control flow**, **name resolution**, and **type checking** to use a shared **traversal visitor** pattern instead of ad-hoc recursive walks.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pekan`
- **Commit:** [`8780c42`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pekan/commit/8780c42)
- **Subject:** Refactor control flow, name resolution, and type checking to use traversal visitor pattern
- **Completed:** 2026-02-27

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.0 (Pecan prototype)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-analysis`
- **Deliverable:** `v00-analysis-foundation`

## Relation
Reduced duplicate HIR walk logic before `HirQuery` became the single traversal API—easier to add rules and diagnostics consistently. Complemented `hir-query-staged-analysis` removal of the legacy traversal module.

source.subject: Refactor control flow, name resolution, and type checking to use traversal visitor pattern
